description: Tennessee STAR Class Size & Outcomes by SES & Grade
skip_reason: The raw Comparison_Students.tab file contains only continuous test score outcomes (Stanford Achievement Test scaled scores such as g1treadss, g1tmathss, g2treadss, etc.) and numeric class sizes — no binary outcome column, no categorical treatment variable, and no stratum columns matching the hints (class_size_category, ses_quartile, grade). The dataset would need substantial pre-processing (binarizing scores into pass/fail, bucketing class sizes into small/regular/large categories) before it could fit the corpus model. As a raw file it does not meet the VIABLE criteria of having a clear binary outcome column ready to aggregate.
